content.en:
In order to save time, Ye Tian was ready to let the five copy bodies try to break through together, as long as there was a breakthrough.

This kind of operation is also only he can do.

Others, even if there are many clones, can break through with their clones, which does not mean that the ontology breaks through.

And these real bodies of his real body copy the body, which is both a doppelganger and an ontology.

"Start to impact the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm, I hope to be able to complete the breakthrough before the third impact of the Supreme Dao Void Demon, otherwise I will only be forced to interrupt the breakthrough!"

Ye Tian wholeheartedly impacted the Sevenfold Dao Realm, and many resources were taken out one by one.

Time passed little by little, and after a while, one of the real body copies the body and failed to break through, which is also normal.

Although comprehending the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, the Supreme Dao Realm of those who take the path of the strongest to the Dao can break through to the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm, and his comprehension of the Fifth Sequence of the Supreme Dao Rules is logically a 100% breakthrough, but it does not mean that he can break through at one time.

Many supreme realms, meeting the conditions for breakthrough, also require many attempts to complete the breakthrough.

The same is true for Ye Tian, it is normal to hit the bottleneck in a hurry and fail.

Click!

Another true body copy body successfully tore through the bottleneck, and the cultivation began to cross to the sevenfold to the Dao realm, and the body was frantically absorbing the energy around it, stepping into the sevenfold Dao realm step by step.

The Mansion of the Lord of Suo.

"In this direction, it's the Lord of the Ye Domain, has he broken through to become a sevenfold Dao realm? That's right, he has enough blood spiritual liquid, he keeps cultivating, and his cultivation is to break through to the peak of the sixth-fold Dao realm, and it is normal to immediately impact the sevenfold Dao realm!"

The Lord of the Su Domain said secretly.

Immediately, she smiled slightly, Ye Tian's breakthrough represented that the strength of the Winter Night Fortress had skyrocketed!

A sevenfold supreme realm who has comprehended the rules of the fifth sequence of supreme dao is no less than a ninefold supreme dao realm!

Once upon a time, when Ye Tiancai came to the Winter Night Fortress, his strength was not very strong, and he had grown to this level in a short period of time.

At this cultivation speed, it may not be long before she may be able to match her combat power!

After another period of time, Ye Tian's cultivation has not been completely stabilized, but it has not affected the battle.

And his other copy bodies have all become sevenfold supreme realms.

......

The Mansion of the Lord of Suo.

Ye Tian and the Su Domain Lord were discussing the issue of dealing with the next wave of attacks from the Supreme Dao Void Demon.

Lord Su said: "Lord Ye Domain, you brought a heavy loss to the Supreme Dao Void Demon last time, this time, the Supreme Dao Void Demon will definitely find a way to kill you!"

"Does the Su Domain Lord have any ideas?"

Ye Tian asked.

Su Yu Lord smiled and said: "It's very simple, that is, lay a trap, I will give you a secret treasure to hide your cultivation, and when they find a way to kill it, you will directly expose your true strength." Then, from within the Sioux clan, I also invited a Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm, and when the time comes, I will also make a move, and I will join you to leave each other. "

"Good!"

Ye Tian agreed.

After that, they began to wait for the next wave of attacks from the Supreme Dao Void Demon.

It didn't take long for the next wave of attacks from the Void Demon to arrive.

As with the previous plan, Ye Tian's five replica bodies were hiding in nodes.

Bang!!!!

A large number of Supreme Dao Void Demons poured in, but this time there was no Supreme Dao Monster cannon fodder, obviously too much Supreme Dao Monster cannon fodder had been consumed before, and this time there were not many Supreme Dao Demons available, so they simply didn't use it.

The two sides directly fought and fought.

It was still the sixth node, Ye Tian instantly killed an eightfold supreme Dao Void Demon, and the cultivation he showed was still a sixfold supreme Dao realm.

Puff puff puff!!

A Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm was about to fall into his hands, and at this moment, a figure appeared, filled with the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, attacking and killing Ye Tian at a speed far exceeding that of the Eightfold Supreme Dao Void Demon.

This is a Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon, who attacked and killed Ye Tian with the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule Divine Power.

In his opinion, he could kill Ye Tian's clone in one move, and then kill Ye Tian's other clones, if he was lucky, he might kill Ye Tian's body.

But in the next moment, his face changed.

Ye Tian's cultivation instantly turned into a sevenfold Dao realm, and then he unleashed a shot with his backhand, colliding with his attack.

Bang!!!!

Ye Tian collided with this Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon and retreated.

"Sevenfold Dao Realm !!"

Only then did this Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon realize that it was impossible for him to kill Ye Tian.

A sevenfold supreme dao realm who has comprehended the rules of the fifth sequence of supreme dao, or takes the path of supreme strength to the dao, and his strength is definitely not weaker than him.

"This plan failed!"

This Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon is not good.

Perhaps this time, the Void Demon's losses in the Winter Night Fortress were far greater than the previous two times.

Immediately.

He continued to fight with Ye Tian, trying to stop Ye Tian, and summoned other Supreme Dao Void Demons to inform him of the specific situation.

That's when it happened.

On the side of the Winter Night Fortress, there is another Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm, this is the Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm from the Sioux Clan, and his strength is much stronger than the ordinary Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm.

This Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm came to the sixth node, supported Ye Tian, and besieged this Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon with Ye Tian.

At this time, Ye Tian was playing as an assistant, mainly relying on this Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm of the Su Clan to kill this Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon.

As time passed, the Ninefold Path Void Demon was injured, and his injuries became more and more serious.

Burst!

The body of the Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon was cut in two, and although it recovered quickly, Ye Tian's attack also arrived, piercing its body again.

In this way, under the continuous attack, this Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon gradually fell into a near-death state.

Rumble!!!

With the final blow, the Ninefold Dao Void Demon completely fell.

"Ye Domain Lord, I have to leave the Winter Night Fortress and go to other fortresses!"

This Ninefold Dao Realm of the Sioux Clan said.

"Good!"

Ye Tianying said.

Immediately, he went to other nodes to support.

Soon, an eightfold Supreme Dao Void Demon was killed, causing the Supreme Dao Void Demon to be defeated.

......

Node 2.

Xingling, the leader of the Winter Night Fortress, was fighting with a top-level eightfold supreme Dao void demon, Blood Vine, whose strength was no less than that of the ordinary Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm, and Xingling could only barely suppress the other party, but he couldn't kill the other party.

Then.

Blood Fujiko's face changed.

"Damn, the plan failed!"

He received news of the retreat and was ready to retreat on it.

Suddenly.

The surrounding space was distorted, and one after another figures arrived, and they were Ye Tian's five replica bodies, which were equivalent to five ordinary ninefold supreme Dao realms!

"Ye Domain Lord, let's kill this blood vine together!"

Stopper Xingling shouted.

"Good!"

Ye Tian's five replica bodies besieged Blood Fujiko together.

Blood Vine Zi may not even be able to defeat one of Ye Tian's copy bodies, but now that Ye Tian's multiple copy bodies are shot together, he will be hit hard in an instant.

In a short time, Blood Vine's body was pierced by Ye Tian's five spears, and the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule shattered his vitality and completely wiped it out.
